title: Intent Agent Identity v1
description: Structured machine identity for Intent Agent Model runtimes. Separates the human-facing persona (bob) from machine keys so binaries, env namespaces, services, telemetry, and state paths never collide across runtimes. Naming contract only — NOT an identity-management or auth system.

schema_version.description: Identity contract version. Unknown versions must be rejected.

persona_id.description: Shared human-facing persona. Never used alone as a machine key.

component_id.description: Canonical operational component (binary/service/telemetry/state), e.g. intent-bob-eino. Must never be the bare persona.

role_id.description: What this run does, e.g. coding. Separate from persona.

instance_id.description: One running copy: component_id:env:opaque. The opaque suffix must not be parsed for meaning.

run_id.description: Per-operation unique id. Optional; must differ from instance_id.

version.description: Application semantic version of the implementation.
